match.userMessage:
Classify music design for each scene and generate a unified music prompt for the sequence.

<SCENES>
[
  {
    "sceneId": "scene1",
    "title": "Studio Reveal",
    "storyBeat": "Introduction of Scarlett and the lipstick product in studio setting",
    "durationSeconds": 12,
    "location": "INT. BONDI STUDIO - MORNING",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, clean, bright and effortless with immediate real-world presence"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene2",
    "title": "Promenade Walk",
    "storyBeat": "Scarlett walking along promenade with beach in background",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH PROMENADE - CONTINUOUS",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool coastal morning with breezy potential energy"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene3",
    "title": "Shoreline Drop",
    "storyBeat": "Lipstick interacts with sand and water at shoreline",
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE - CONTINUOUS",
    "timeOfDay": "afternoon",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory, warm coastal moment with potential energy"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene4",
    "title": "Tidal Pool Test",
    "storyBeat": "Macro demonstration of product in water",
    "durationSeconds": 7,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - TIDAL POOL - MOMENTS LATER",
    "timeOfDay": "afternoon",
    "visualSummary": "Serene, sensory, effortlessly cool coastal moment"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene5",
    "title": "Rocks Confession",
    "storyBeat": "Scarlett speaking into mic at rocks with rising tide",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - ROCKS - CONTINUOUS",
    "timeOfDay": "afternoon",
    "visualSummary": "Calm reflective, fresh sensory coastal mood with potential energy"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene6",
    "title": "Bench Application",
    "storyBeat": "Reapplication of lipstick on bench",
    "durationSeconds": 6,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - PROMENADE BENCH - CONTINUOUS",
    "timeOfDay": "afternoon",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, casual outdoor beach moment with effortless cool and sensory warmth"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene7",
    "title": "Shallow Surf Wade",
    "storyBeat": "Scarlett wading in surf with lipstick behind ear",
    "durationSeconds": 6,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHALLOW SURF - CONTINUOUS",
    "timeOfDay": "afternoon",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool beach moment"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene8",
    "title": "Driftwood Flat Lay",
    "storyBeat": "Overhead product shot on driftwood",
    "durationSeconds": 7,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - DRIFTWOOD - CONTINUOUS",
    "timeOfDay": "afternoon",
    "visualSummary": "peaceful natural afternoon, fresh and effortlessly cool"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene9",
    "title": "Final Laugh",
    "storyBeat": "Closing shot and call to action",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - FINAL WAVE - CONTINUOUS",
    "timeOfDay": "afternoon",
    "visualSummary": "joyful, fresh, sensory coastal closure"
  }
]
</SCENES>

For each scene, classify:
1. presence: "none"|"minimal"|"moderate"|"full"
2. style: Genre/instrumentation (if music present)
3. mood: Emotional quality (if music present)
4. atmosphere: Environmental atmosphere

Then synthesize unified tags (starting with "instrumental") and a 1-2 sentence prompt for one cohesive music track.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
